response:
**Subject:** Thank You & Farewell

Dear Team,

As my time here comes to an end, I want to thank each of you for the support, collaboration, and memories we’ve shared. Working alongside such talented and kind people has made this experience truly special. I’ll miss our teamwork and camaraderie but look forward to staying in touch. Please don’t hesitate to reach out—I’d love to hear how everyone is doing. Wishing you all continued success and happiness!

Best,
[Your Name]
